text: CloudFront Terms @ st @ e Origin - The source location of your content * $3 Origin or Custom Origin e Distribution - The ‘configuration’ unit of CloudFront e Edge Location - Local cache of your data e Regional Edge Cache - Larger version of an edge location. Provides another layer of caching.
